articles.title: Vivek Oberoi celebrates mother, wife and sister in heartfelt Mother’s Day tribute
articles.description: Actor Vivek Oberoi honored the women who shape future generations this Mother's Day. He lauded his mother for her unwavering strength, his wife Priyanka for nurturing their children, and his sister Meghna for embodying their mother's grace. Oberoi expressed profound gratitude for the women who have influenced his life and are building the next generation with love and resilience.

The party secured a significant victory in the state assembly elections. Their manifesto promised extensive welfare schemes for women, job opportunities for youth, and reforms in governance. This marks a major shift in Tamil Nadu's political landscape.

articles.title: ‘Aliens In Space Suits & Helmets’: MOST SHOCKING FBI Memo Exposes ‘4-Foot-Tall’ UFO Crew | Watch
articles.description: A newly declassified set of UFO-related FBI and Pentagon documents has reignited global fascination with unidentified aerial phenomena. Among the most startling claims are witness accounts describing possible “four-foot-tall” humanoid beings seen in connection with unidentified flying craft. The files, dating back decades, reference alleged encounters, strange metallic objects, and reports from individuals described as credible sources including military and law enforcement personnel. While no evidence confirms extraterrestrial life, the documents have fueled renewed debate over government transparency and unexplained aerial sightings. Officials stress that the reports are unverified and do not constitute proof of alien contact.

The FBI and local police are involved. A hair sample was sent for analysis.

articles.description: A devastating truck accident in Giridih's Dumri block claimed five lives and injured over 20. Authorities are investigating the truck's entry into the crowded market.
